# Pinned dev/CI toolchain — the gate that verifies reproducibility must itself
# run on a fixed toolchain, so a CI result is a property of the code, not of
# whatever pytest/ruff floated in that day. Bump deliberately, in this file.
# (The vericlaim PACKAGE stays zero-dependency; these are dev-only.)
pytest==9.0.3
ruff==0.15.16
